name: @librecode/multica-mcp-app
description: MCP App: Multica kanban + agent-activity mirror — embeds Multica's Linear-style board into LibreCode and pushes agent activity to Multica issues
_note: Lives at mcpapps/multica/ inside the LibreCode monorepo for now;
designed as a self-contained package so a future `git filter-repo`
extraction into a dedicated `librecode-multica-mcp-app` repository is
trivial. Nothing in this package imports from other LibreCode packages.
